description_long: This is a spiral-bound notebook with a glossy orange cover, featuring a splash-like graphic and some text on the front. The cover is slightly bent, giving it a used and flexible appearance. The spiral binding is white and runs along the left edge, holding together lined white pages with a faint blue tint. The interior pages are ruled with blue horizontal lines and a red vertical margin line, typical of standard notebooks. The back cover is also orange and appears to be made of the same material as the front. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for note-taking or journaling in an urban environment.
description: Glossy orange spiral-bound notebook with lined white pages and a splash graphic on the front cover.
description_view_0: Front cover view showing the orange cover, splash graphic, and spiral binding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white spiral binding and the lined pages inside the notebook.
description_view_2: Interior view displaying the lined white pages and the orange back cover.
description_view_3: Back cover view showing the plain orange surface and the spiral binding along the edge.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized splash or ink blot graphic in the center, rendered in a dark color against the orange background. There are no other prominent illustrations or detailed artwork visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is orange with visible white spiral binding loops running vertically. No text or decorative elements are present on the spine.
